protocol: Any agent: read blockers → pick_task.py list → claim → work → done → render. Specs in specs/; fleet in config/fleet.json.

blockers.title: RESOLVED 2026-07-02: C: drive freed to ~10 GB
blockers.why: Root cause was a 10.4 GB npm cache; cleared (npm cache clean --force) plus stale .next outputs. HF cache (360 GB) and Docker WSL VHDs (46 GB) remain the structural consumers.
blockers.unblock: Resolved. BLK-DOCKER still needs Docker Desktop restart (disk no longer the cause).

blockers.title: Docker Desktop API error (consequence of BLK-DISK)
blockers.why: Postgres :5433, Redis :6379 unavailable — local API/worker/kickoff/migrate blocked.
blockers.unblock: Fix BLK-DISK first, then: pnpm dev:stack && pnpm db:migrate

blockers.title: Prod stack not provisioned (Operator)
blockers.why: No Neon DATABASE_URL, Railway core-api/worker, or Vercel fleet env. Sites still on localhost API.
blockers.unblock: Operator: Neon via Vercel Marketplace, Railway deploy (ADR-002), pnpm vercel:link-fleet:exec
